summary: Added a provenance-preserving claim transition ledger that records how observed, inferred, proposed, superseded, and unresolved project claims change without erasing earlier records.
privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract operational claims only; private chat, health, credentials, identifying data, and unreviewed uploads excluded.
verification: GitHub acknowledged both additive file commits; the ledger contains three transition records and explicit falsification routes.
unresolved: No automated transition validator exists yet.
No atomic repository-wide queue consolidation protocol has been proven.
next_action: Add a deterministic validator that checks allowed transitions, referenced continuity record IDs, source locators, and non-erasure of superseded observations.
